name: memory_search
description: Search long-term memory from past conversations with this user. Use when: (1) the user asks what you remember, (2) you want to connect current topic to past discussions, (3) you need context about their projects/preferences/history. Returns memories spanning personal info, past projects, discussed topics, decisions made, etc.

query.description: What to search for (e.g. 'audit project discussed last week', 'user preferences', 'HKICPA exam prep', 'what projects are they working on')

mode.description: search = find memories relevant to query. all = return everything from all past conversations.
